permissions.fallback_msg: This skill needs to call the PayPal REST API (orders, captures, subscriptions, refunds, IPN verification) to process payments. Allow this external API call?
This skill needs to POST data to PayPal endpoints (e.g., token acquisition, order creation, IPN verification, refund submission). Allow this outbound POST request?
This skill needs to fetch data from PayPal endpoints (e.g., order details, refund details). Allow this outbound GET request?
This skill needs to read PayPal credentials (client ID and client secret) to authenticate with the PayPal API. Allow access to these secrets?
This skill needs to read existing source code files (e.g., paypal-client.py, ipn-processor.py, recurring-billing.py) within the workspace. Allow reading these files?
This skill needs to create or modify source code files (e.g., PayPal client, IPN processor, subscription management scripts) within the workspace. Allow writing these files?
This skill needs to read reference files and assets (e.g., express-checkout.md, ipn-handling.md, refund-workflows.md) within the workspace. Allow reading these files?
This skill needs to write generated integration files and assets to the workspace. Allow writing files within the workspace?
This skill needs to read environment variables (e.g., PAYPAL_CLIENT_ID, PAYPAL_CLIENT_SECRET, mode flag) to configure PayPal API access. Allow reading environment variables?
This skill requires outbound network access to reach PayPal sandbox and production API endpoints. Allow outbound network connections?
